scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-medium leading-tight
scale.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono text-neutral-500

nav.style: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-white/10 transition-all duration-300

button.primary: bg-white text-black px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-medium hover:bg-neutral-200 transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-transparent text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-medium border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors
button.accent: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black px-6 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/90 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)]

card.style: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-white/[0.04] transition-colors relative overflow-hidden group
card.glow: absolute inset-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/5 to-transparent pointer-events-none transition-opacity duration-500

badge.style: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-xs font-mono text-neutral-300

hero.layout: relative min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center pt-24 pb-16 overflow-hidden
hero.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#050505]/40 via-[#050505]/60 to-[#050505] z-0

marquee.items: text-neutral-500 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest mx-12 flex items-center gap-2

footer.big_text: text-[12vw] font-black tracking-tighter text-white/5 leading-none select-none overflow-hidden text-center

video_hero.description: Background video for the main hero section.

logo.description: Main brand logo to be used in navbar and footer.

ai_innovation.description: Abstract neon technology background for the AI Showcase section.

case_study_1.description: Abstract neon lights for Case Study 1 thumbnail.

case_study_2.description: Abstract purple and pink lights for Case Study 2 thumbnail.

case_study_3.description: Abstract streaks for Case Study 3 thumbnail.

animations.fade_in_up: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, transition: { duration: 0.6, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Install 'framer-motion' for scroll animations and fluid transitions.
Install 'react-fast-marquee' for the client logos and tech stack marquees.
For the Hero section, implement an HTML5 <video> tag in the background with 'autoPlay loop muted playsInline'. Overlay it with a dark gradient so the text is fully legible.
Never use plain for the logo without styling it; set specific height (e.g., h-8).
All cards must have a 1px border of 'border-white/10' and use the 'bg-white/[0.02]' background. Avoid solid backgrounds.
Ensure 'Outfit' font is loaded from Google Fonts for headings, and 'Inter' for body.
Do NOT use center alignment for the Services grid or Case Studies; use left-alignment to maintain the Swiss Tech aesthetic.
For the Process Timeline, use a vertical layout with a thin white line on the left, and nodes for each step.
All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit').
For the 'Tech Stack' section, use a marquee with simple lucide-react icons and text (e.g., <Code /> React, <Database /> PostgreSQL) to look abstract and technical.
The final CTA section should be massive, centered, with an Electric Cyan accent button.
